matches\n  text_weight=0.6,\n  temporal_weight=0.1,\n)\n\n# With filters\nresults = mem.recall(\n  \"database migration\",\n  tags=[\"backend\", \"infrastructure\"],\n  since=\"2026-04-01\",\n
